name: Minimal Alpha Air Tasking Order
description: Synthetic ATO-lite for NEON COMMAND. Defines mission intent, defended priority, reserve posture, and approval authority.

planning_intent.commander_intent: Protect Arktholm while preserving at least one fighter for follow-on uncertainty.

reserve_policy.reserve_rationale: Maintain a fighter reserve in case the initial contact is a probe or precursor to a follow-on group.

missions.title: Northern defensive patrol
missions.tasking: Maintain defensive posture and remain available for intercept tasking.
constraints: Avoid committing all fighters unless threat pressure becomes critical.

missions.title: Quick reaction reserve
missions.tasking: Hold as reserve unless first-line response is insufficient.
constraints: Preserve if possible for follow-on uncertainty.

missions.title: Firewatch point defence
missions.tasking: Provide area coverage for the Arktholm southern approach.
constraints: Prefer GBAD coverage when it preserves fighter reserve and still protects Arktholm.

notes: Used only as planning context and mission constraints.
Not a real operational air tasking order.
